query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
  p.territories, p.assignedBusinessLines, p.salesMotion, p.offerCategories, p.sectorFocus
FROM users u
JOIN userProfiles p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role != 'admin'
ORDER BY u.name;
command:

ORDER BY u.name;
